lambda_a.description: Constant failure rate per hour for each power supply when all 15 are operating.

lambda_b.description: Constant failure rate per hour for each remaining power supply when one has already failed.

mu.description: Constant repair rate per hour for a failed power supply.

n_total.description: Total number of identical active power supplies in the system.

n_min_required.description: Minimum number of power supplies required for the system to function (system fails when 2 fail).
